memoryArtifacts.headline: Verdun, Sir Theobald De  story
memoryArtifacts.description: Sir Theobald De Verdun was born on September 8, 1278. He had one daughter with Elizabeth DeClare in 1387. He died on July 27, 1316, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 37.

popularStory.headline: Verdun, Sir Theobald De  story
popularStory.description: Sir Theobald De Verdun was born on September 8, 1278. He had one daughter with Elizabeth DeClare in 1387. He died on July 27, 1316, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 37.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun於大約1248年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾阿頓時，他的父親John de Burghersh28歲，母親Margery de Lacy23歲。他於大約1275年與Margery de Bohun在英國格盧斯特斯爾比士利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1309年8月24日在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福爾 波藍茲享年62歲，埋葬在英國斯塔福爾可洛登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun于大约1248年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾阿頓时，他的父亲John de Burghersh28岁，母亲Margery de Lacy23岁。他于大约1275年与Margery de Bohun在英国格盧斯特斯爾比士利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1309年8月24日在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福爾 波藍茲享年62岁，埋葬在英国斯塔福爾可洛登。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Verdun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from any of several places in France called Verdun. The placename is probably of Gaulish origin, deriving from ver(n) ‘alder’ + dūn ‘hill, fortress’.
Spanish and Catalan: habitational name from Verdú in Catalonia (Spain), which has the same origin as the French name (see 1 above).
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Verdon  , a cognate of 1 above. This surname is very rare in Britain.

variants.name: Virden
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Verdun  .

variants.name: Verdon
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Marcel, Pierre, Renaud, Sylvie.
French: habitational name from (Le) Verdon, the name of several places in various parts of France, for example in Dordogne, Gironde, and Marne. Compare   Ferdon  .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Verdun, the name of a fief in Vessey (Manche), France. Compare   Verdun  .

nameMeanings.name: Theobald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from þeud ‘people, race’ + bald ‘bold, brave’. The first element was altered under the influence of Greek theos ‘god’. This name was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun was born about 1248, in Alton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Burghersh, was 28 and his mother, Margery de Lacy, was 23. He married Margery de Bohun about 1275, in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 August 1309, in Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Croxden, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun est né environ 1248, à Alton, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Burghersh, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margery de Lacy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Bohun environ 1275, à Bisley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 août 1309, à Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Croxden, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun um 1248 in Alton, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Burghersh 28 und seine Mutter Margery de Lacy 23. Er hat um 1275 in Bisley, Gloucestershire, England Margery de Bohun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. August 1309 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, England und wurde in Croxden, Staffordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun è nato il circa 1248 nel Alton, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Burghersh, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Margery de Lacy, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Bohun circa 1275, nel Bisley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 agosto 1309, nel Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Croxden, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdunが約1248年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアルトンで生まれた時，父John de Burghershは28歳，母Margery de Lacyは23歳であった。約1275年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアビスリーでMargery de Bohunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1309年8月24日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードシュアイア ムールランズで62歳で死去し，イギリススタフォードシュアイアクロクスデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun(이)가 대략 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 알턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Burghersh(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery de Lacy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 그루스스터실르 비슬리에서 Margery de Bohun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1309년 8월 24일 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드실르 무를랜드즈에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스태퍼드실르 크록스든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Burghersh, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margery de Lacy, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Bohun aproximadamente 1275, em Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1309, em Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Croxden, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ro.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun родился около 1248 г. в местности алтон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Burghersh было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery de Lacy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Bohun около 1275 г. в местности бисли, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 августа 1309 г. в местности стаффордшир мурландс, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности кроксден, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Theobald de Verdun 1st Lord Verdun nació aproximadamente 1248, en Alton, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Burghersh, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margery de Lacy, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margery de Bohun aproximadamente 1275, en Bisley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de agosto de 1309, en Staffordshire Moorlands, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Croxden, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
